hierarchy.description: Agent hierarchy for the Daily Briefing System. Agents are organized by tier: Tier 1 (Executive) agents report directly to Brian. Tier 2 (Operational) agents handle day-to-day operations and report to Tier 1. Tier 3 (Support) agents perform background monitoring and feed into Tier 2.

1.name: Executive
1.description: Top-level agents that synthesize information and present it in the daily brief.

2.name: Operational
2.description: Agents that manage specific operational domains and report up to Executive agents.

3.name: Support
3.description: Background agents that continuously monitor, collect, and process information.

agents.name: Chief of Staff Agent
agents.role: Assembles the daily brief by collecting reports from all Tier 2 agents, prioritizing items, and flagging anything that requires Brian's immediate attention.

agents.name: Calendar Management Agent
agents.role: Manages Brian's calendar — schedules, reschedules, and flags conflicts. Prepares the next day's schedule nightly and adjusts in the morning.

agents.name: Communications Agent
agents.role: Processes all emails, messages, and chat threads. Summarizes what needs a response, flags overdue follow-ups, and drafts replies when appropriate.

agents.name: Project Tracking Agent
agents.role: Monitors all active projects, tracks milestones and deadlines, and generates status reports.

agents.name: Client Relations Agent
agents.role: Tracks client onboarding, check-ins, and satisfaction. Ensures no client falls through the cracks.

agents.name: Urgent Issues Agent
agents.role: Monitors for critical issues, escalations, and emergencies. Coordinates agent response when fires arise.

agents.name: Calendar Scanner
agents.role: Scans connected calendars for new events, conflicts, and changes. Feeds raw data to the Calendar Management Agent.

agents.name: Email Scanner
agents.role: Monitors email inboxes for new messages, categorizes them by urgency and topic.

agents.name: Chat Scanner
agents.role: Monitors chat platforms for messages requiring attention or follow-up.

agents.name: Milestone Tracker
agents.role: Tracks project milestones against deadlines and flags items that are at risk or overdue.

agents.name: Client Monitor
agents.role: Monitors client activity, onboarding progress, and flags clients that haven't been contacted recently.

agents.name: Alert Monitor
agents.role: Continuously watches for system alerts, critical emails, and escalation triggers.

statusDefinitions.active: Agent is online and performing its duties on schedule.
statusDefinitions.in-progress: Agent is actively processing a specific task right now.
statusDefinitions.pending: Agent is queued and will begin work shortly.
statusDefinitions.idle: Agent is on standby, waiting to be triggered.
statusDefinitions.blocked: Agent cannot proceed due to a dependency or issue.
